description: Functional workflow evals for the Contextro skill. Covers the highest-value problem-first flows: orientation, safe refactor, bug investigation, compaction recovery, AST rewrite safety, and current output-contract handling.

categories.workflow: Multi-step tool sequences happen in the right order
categories.functional: The chosen tools solve the user task correctly
categories.output_format: The agent handles confidence, text-first outputs, archive retrieval, and current response contracts correctly
categories.performance_comparison: The skill reduces reads and tool chatter relative to baseline

evals.name: workflow-safe-refactor-order
evals.prompt: I want to rename BaseEmbeddingService to EmbeddingBackend across the codebase.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls impact first, then explain and/or find_callers before giving rename guidance.

assertions.passing_condition: impact('BaseEmbeddingService') called before any rename recommendation

evals.name: output-format-file-symbol-contract
evals.prompt: You called code(operation='get_document_symbols') and got {"file":"src/cache.rs","columns":["name","type","line","signature"],"symbols":[["QueryCache","class",14,"pub struct QueryCache {"],["get","method",34,"pub fn get(&self, key: &str) -> Option<_>"]],"total":2}. Summarize the first symbol and mention why signature may be absent in other calls.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent reads the columnar row correctly, identifies QueryCache at line 14, and explains that signature is only present when include_signature=true.

assertions.text: columnar get_document_symbols payload is interpreted correctly
assertions.passing_condition: agent identifies QueryCache at line 14 and notes signature is opt-in
